div.h2: Log2 Histogram Bucket Aggregation & TCP Lifecycle Tracking

ol.li: Log2 Alignment: Bucket $i$ represents range $[2^i, 2^{i+1}-1]$ ns.
Memory Safety: bpf_probe_read_kernel for task_struct fields.
Performance: PERCPU_ARRAY avoids spinlocks, critical for high frequency.
RingBuf: Used for TCP events to preserve strict chronological order.
Overhead: Total tracing overhead < 150ns per syscall.
Map Cleanup: Syscall exit MUST delete tid from start_timestamps.

g.title: Summation of PERCPU maps across N cores
Summation of PERCPU maps across N cores
